<p>US President Donald Trump, whose war and <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1957889">immigration policies</a> have been condemned by Pope Leo, reiterated his criticism of the religious leader on Tuesday night.</p>

news.headline: In Indonesia, leaked plan for US military overflights triggers sovereignty row
news.summary:
A leaked plan to grant the US military sweeping overflight access to Indonesia’s airspace has triggered a domestic backlash over concerns that Jakarta is “colluding with the aggressor” amid Washington’s war on Iran.
